name: a representative tool from each supported format is wired: eslint (json), ruff (toml), rubocop (yaml), mypy (ini)
command: ruby -ryaml -e 't=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"]; ok = t["eslint"]["render"]["fmt"]=="json" && t["ruff"]["render"]["fmt"]=="toml" && t["rubocop"]["render"]["fmt"]=="yaml" && t["mypy"]["render"]["fmt"]=="ini"; exit(ok ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo representative-per-format-wired 1>&2
